title: 20 Pcs cat mouse toy, Cat Catnip Mice Toys, Cat Toy Mice Rattle Set, mouse cat toy, Interactive Realistic Plush Pets, Variety Interactive Cat Toy,with Feather Tail for Cat Kitten (Random Color)
features: 【Package includes】There are 20 mouses in the set. This is a magical mouse, loved by cats all over the world. This toy can relieve the cat’s mood, eliminate boredom, and make the cat have endless fun.

【Premium Material】Cat mouse toys are made of faux fur, plastic body and colourful feather tails, they are safe and durable. all dyes are safe for your cat and are ideal toys for kitten boredom solve for playing indoors.
【Strong and Sturdy】Cat toy feather mouse does not break easily and is more durable. For kittens and cats of all ages and sizes. These catnip toys for cats are strong but not indestructible

【Exercise Cat Toy】There are small rocks inside the mouse,which will make a sound of rustling to stimulate the cat's instinct to catch it.Catnip feather mice is the best toy to exercise the cat's sensitivity, keeping your cat agile,more nimble and energetic.
【Make friends with cats】These fun kitten toys are the best gift for your cat, use this entertaining cat toy to build trust and build a partnership with them.
